div.div: The Immovable God and the Eternal Euthymia
Earn a silver medal on any official survival map.
Earn a bronze medal on any official Survival map.
Destroy a Tank's rock in mid-air.
Reach a 10-heart friend level with 8 people.
Get married and have two kids.
Bring back the original title screen.
Reach the 15th wave of a pumpkin moon, where evil lurks among the autumn harvest.
